title: Defy The Abyss
description:
Defy The Abyss is a short, fast-paced tag team horde survival game where you choose your challenges until the end of the dungeon.

Key Features• Fight to survive: Defy the Abyss is a horde survival top down shooter where you will clash in a dungeon against hordes of ghosts, specters and supernatural creatures.

• Choose your destiny: Pick from a wide variety of challenges in each run, like Time Survival, Relic Protection and Combo Challenges, or go for a long, survival-only mission.

• Form your team: Switch between characters and create powerful synergies to survive the madness.

• Power up: Multiple upgrades at random available through every run, making each game session a different experience.

• Mix and improve: Different characters, Ultimate abilities and perks will change the course of every run.

• Come back anytime: A short game with game sessions ranging from 10 minutes to 1 hour, where you can unlock new characters and abilities with all your collected gems in-game.

Don't surrender. Defy The Abyss.
description_short: Survive relentless hordes in a dungeon deep within the Abyss. Swap between heroes, unleash powerful spells, and crush nightmares, demons, and immense horrors to grow stronger with every run, in this fast-paced horde survival.
